creator: erj@freebsd.org
text:
I also got a log message directing me to this PR. This was on a Framework 13 laptop with the Intel Meteor Lake processor. I just upgraded to this FreeBSD 15 with DRM updates: https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/pull/344.

Intel(R) Wireless WiFi based driver for FreeBSD
